faqs.question: What is Stacker's AI builder?
faqs.answer: Stacker's AI builder lets users describe what they need in natural language and generates a functional no-code application, including redesigning layouts and adding features on request.

use_cases.title: Internal tool building
use_cases.description: Generate internal business applications from a natural-language description instead of manual no-code configuration.

use_cases.title: Client portals
use_cases.description: Build white-labeled, unlimited customer-facing portals with custom domains.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Stacker?
paragraphs: Stacker is a no-code application platform where users describe the app they need in natural language and its AI builder generates a functional tool, which can then be edited visually.
Beneath the AI layer is a traditional no-code platform designed to support business-critical applications, with over 2,000 integrations and white-labeled customer portals.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Stacker is for
paragraphs: Stacker is designed for non-technical business users who need custom internal tools, CRMs, or client portals without hiring developers.

enrichment.short_description: Noloco is a no-code platform for building custom CRMs, project trackers, client portals, and internal apps connected to existing data sources.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Noloco is a no-code platform for building CRMs, client portals, and internal apps, with a free plan and paid tiers starting at $99/month.

features.title: Interface Builder
features.description: Point-and-click app creation without coding.

features.title: Connected Data (Noloco Tables)
features.description: Real-time data management with sync capabilities to external sources.

features.title: Nola AI Assistant
features.description: Builds and customizes apps from natural-language prompts.

features.title: Workflows
features.description: Custom automations to reduce manual work.

features.title: Granular permissions
features.description: Access control at table, page, record, and field levels.

features.title: Public access sharing
features.description: Share specific app sections publicly while keeping other areas private.

pros: Free plan with 3 team seats, 7 client seats, and 2,000 rows, no credit card required
14-day free trial included on all paid plans
40+ integrations including Airtable, Google Sheets, Slack, HubSpot, and Stripe
50% discount for non-profits on any paid plan
Used by 1,000+ professional services firms
cons: Pro plan jumps to $99/month (or $149/month if paying monthly instead of annually)
Extra team/client seats and rows beyond plan limits cost additional per-unit fees
Enterprise plan pricing requires a custom quote

faqs.question: Does Noloco have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan includes 3 team seats, 7 client seats, and 2,000 rows with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How much does Noloco's Pro plan cost?
faqs.answer: The Pro plan is $99/month billed monthly, or $149/month effectively when billed annually with a 33% discount shown on the site.

faqs.question: What integrations does Noloco support?
faqs.answer: Noloco offers 40+ integrations including Airtable, Google Sheets, Zapier, Slack, HubSpot, Stripe, and QuickBooks.

faqs.question: What is Nola?
faqs.answer: Nola is Noloco's AI assistant that builds and customizes apps from natural-language prompts.

use_cases.title: Client portals
use_cases.description: Build white-labeled portals for clients to access project data.

use_cases.title: Internal CRMs and trackers
use_cases.description: Create custom CRMs and project trackers connected to existing data.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Noloco?
paragraphs: Noloco is a no-code platform that lets teams build custom CRMs, project trackers, client portals, and dashboards connected to existing data sources like Airtable and Google Sheets.
Its Nola AI assistant can build and customize apps from natural-language prompts, and a free plan is available alongside paid tiers starting at $99/month.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Noloco is for
paragraphs: Noloco targets professional services firms, agencies, and small-to-medium businesses that want custom internal systems without hiring developers.

enrichment.short_description: WeWeb is a no-code visual development platform that generates web applications from AI prompts and exports production-ready Vue.js code.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: WeWeb is a no-code platform combining AI app generation with a visual editor, exporting production-ready Vue.js code for self-hosting.

features.title: AI Assistant
features.description: Generates full web apps, pages, databases, and logic from text descriptions.

features.title: Visual Editor
features.description: Drag-and-drop interface for editing without code.

features.title: Code Export
features.description: Outputs production-ready Vue.js Single Page Applications for self-hosting.

features.title: Backend Builder
features.description: Tools for creating databases and application logic.

features.title: Figma import
features.description: Imports designs directly from Figma.

features.title: Database integrations
features.description: Connects to Airtable, Xano, and Supabase.

pros: Founded in 2019 and headquartered in Paris, France
Full code ownership: apps can be exported and self-hosted
No per-app-user charges according to the site
SOC2, HIPAA, and GDPR compliance support
Used by large companies including PwC, L'Oreal, and Carrefour
cons: Detailed dollar pricing is not consistently published on the main site (pricing page is a separate, frequently-updated subdomain)
Requires a paid Seat plan (Essential or above) before a Hosting plan can be added
Visual/no-code editor still assumes some technical familiarity for backend logic

faqs.question: Does WeWeb offer a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, WeWeb's documentation lists Free tiers among both its Seat plans and Hosting plans.

faqs.question: Can I export code from WeWeb?
faqs.answer: Yes, WeWeb outputs production-ready Vue.js Single Page Applications that can be self-hosted.

faqs.question: When was WeWeb founded?
faqs.answer: WeWeb was founded in 2019.

faqs.question: What databases does WeWeb connect to?
faqs.answer: WeWeb integrates with Airtable, Xano, and Supabase, among other data sources.

use_cases.title: MVP and app building
use_cases.description: Generate a working web app from an AI prompt and refine it visually.

use_cases.title: Internal tools and client apps
use_cases.description: Build internal or client-facing web apps with exportable, self-hostable code.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is WeWeb?
paragraphs: WeWeb, founded in 2019 in Paris, is a no-code visual development platform that can generate full web applications from AI prompts and lets users refine them with a drag-and-drop editor.
Unlike many no-code tools, WeWeb exports production-ready Vue.js code that can be self-hosted, and it connects to backends like Airtable, Xano, and Supabase.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who WeWeb is for
paragraphs: WeWeb serves founders building MVPs as well as larger organizations and agencies that need custom web apps with code ownership and self-hosting options.

enrichment.short_description: Bravo Studio turns Figma design files into real native iOS and Android apps using an AI-driven build engine, no code required.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Bravo Studio converts Figma designs into native React Native iOS/Android apps with AI code generation, Convex backend support, and a free plan.

features.title: Design-to-app conversion
features.description: Turns Figma design files into a production-ready native app, keeping the design file as the source of truth.

features.title: AI-driven build engine
features.description: Uses LLM technology to generate real React Native code from the design.

features.title: Live device preview
features.description: Bravo Vision lets you preview the app on real iOS and Android devices before publishing.

features.title: Backend data connections
features.description: Connects apps to Convex, REST, and GraphQL data sources.

features.title: Bravo MCP
features.description: An AI-native builder accessible from Claude, Cursor, and ChatGPT via Model Context Protocol, included on the Solo plan.

features.title: App store publishing
features.description: Delivers signed React Native builds ready for submission to the App Store and Google Play.

pros: Free Learn plan lets you build unlimited app projects up to 15 screens before paying
Produces real React Native code rather than a locked no-code wrapper
Solo plan's free trial gives full access, including Bravo MCP, with no credit card required
Supports common integrations like Stripe, OAuth, Firebase, and deep links out of the box
cons: Free plan caps apps at 15 screens, which limits it to simple projects
No web app output is mentioned — the platform is focused on iOS and Android only
Full-service builds (Bravo To Go) cost a flat €999, a significant jump from the subscription plans

faqs.question: What does Bravo Studio do?
faqs.answer: It converts Figma design files into native React Native mobile apps for iOS and Android using an AI-driven build engine.

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Learn plan is free forever and supports unlimited app projects up to 15 screens each.

faqs.question: Does Bravo Studio offer a free trial of paid features?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Solo plan trial gives full access, including Bravo MCP, with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Can Bravo Studio connect to a backend?
faqs.answer: Yes, it supports Convex, REST, and GraphQL data sources.

faqs.question: What is Bravo MCP?
faqs.answer: It's an AI-native builder that lets you build apps from Claude, Cursor, or ChatGPT via the Model Context Protocol, included on the Solo plan.

use_cases.title: Turning a Figma prototype into a real app
use_cases.description: Designers can ship their own Figma work as a functioning native app without hiring a developer.

use_cases.title: Fast MVP for a mobile startup
use_cases.description: Solo founders can validate an app idea by building a real, store-ready app in days.

use_cases.title: Agency client delivery
use_cases.description: Agencies use Bravo To Go's concierge build for a fast, done-for-you app delivery.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Bravo Studio?
paragraphs: Bravo Studio is a no-code mobile app platform that converts Figma design files into real native iOS and Android apps, using an AI-driven build engine to generate React Native code rather than a proprietary wrapper.
It keeps the design file as the source of truth, offers live device previews before publishing, and can connect apps to Convex, REST, or GraphQL backends.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Bravo Studio is for
paragraphs: It suits product designers who want to ship their own Figma work, solo founders and small teams validating a mobile MVP, and agencies that need to deliver client apps quickly.

enrichment.short_description: Typedream is a no-code website builder for creating sites, link-in-bio pages, and selling digital products like ebooks and courses.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Typedream is a no-code site builder for building websites, link-in-bio pages, and selling digital products, with a free plan and paid tiers from $15/mo.

features.title: Drag-and-drop website builder
features.description: Build responsive websites with pre-designed templates, no code required.

features.title: Digital product sales
features.description: Sell ebooks, courses, templates, files, and services directly from your site.

features.title: Link in bio
features.description: A customizable bio-link page with drag-and-drop widgets.

features.title: Forms and email capture
features.description: Built-in lead generation and email signup tools.

features.title: Blog with CMS collections
features.description: Publish content through a database-connected blog.

features.title: Site analytics
features.description: Track website traffic directly from the dashboard on paid plans.

pros: Free plan available with no credit card required
Combines website building, blogging, and digital product sales in one tool
14-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
Includes a free 1-year .xyz domain on paid plans
cons: Free plan is limited to a single page and takes a 5% transaction fee on sales
Paid plans still charge a 2% transaction fee plus payment processing fees
Now operates as a beehiiv-owned product rather than an independent company

faqs.question: Is Typedream free to use?
faqs.answer: Yes, there's a free plan limited to one page with a 5% transaction fee, plus paid Launch and Grow plans.

faqs.question: Can I sell digital products with Typedream?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can sell ebooks, courses, templates, files, and services directly from your site.

faqs.question: Does Typedream include a blog?
faqs.answer: Yes, paid plans include CMS-backed blog collections — one on Launch, unlimited on Grow.

faqs.question: Is Typedream still active?
faqs.answer: Yes, it was acquired by beehiiv in June 2024 and continues to operate under the Typedream name.

faqs.question: Is there a refund guarantee?
faqs.answer: Yes, paid plans come with a 14-day money-back guarantee.

use_cases.title: Selling a digital product
use_cases.description: Creators can list and sell ebooks, courses, or templates directly from their Typedream site.

use_cases.title: Link-in-bio page
use_cases.description: Solo creators can build a customizable bio-link page to centralize their links.

use_cases.title: Simple business website
use_cases.description: Entrepreneurs and side-hustlers can launch a website with a blog and forms without coding.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Typedream?
paragraphs: Typedream is a no-code website builder that lets creators build sites, link-in-bio pages, and sell digital products such as ebooks, courses, and templates from a single platform.
It was acquired by beehiiv in June 2024 and continues operating under the Typedream name, with a free tier and two paid tiers that add custom domains, analytics, blogging, and higher usage limits.

enrichment.short_description: Unicorn Platform is an AI-assisted no-code website builder for launching SaaS, app, directory, and startup landing pages.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Unicorn Platform is a no-code website builder with an AI Co-Pilot for building SaaS, startup, and directory sites, free plan plus paid tiers from $9/mo.

features.title: AI Co-Pilot
features.description: Build or edit a website using text prompts instead of manual design work.

features.title: No-code editor
features.description: Build a full website without design or coding expertise.

features.title: Custom code support
features.description: Insert custom HTML, CSS, and JS for advanced customization.

features.title: Blog builder
features.description: Publish blog posts directly from the platform.

features.title: Stripe payments
features.description: Accept payments on the site via Stripe integration.

features.title: Free SSL and CDN
features.description: All sites get SSL certificates and CDN delivery by default, even on the free plan.

pros: Free-forever Lurker plan available to test the builder before paying
30-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
Annual billing saves over 30% versus monthly pricing
AI Co-Pilot allows editing a site with prompts instead of manual layout work
cons: Free Lurker plan cannot publish a live website (0 published sites)
Branding removal requires the Startup plan or higher
Unlimited team collaborators require the Business plan or higher

faqs.question: Is Unicorn Platform free?
faqs.answer: The Lurker plan is free forever, though it does not allow publishing a live site; paid plans start at the Maker tier.

faqs.question: What does the AI Co-Pilot do?
faqs.answer: It lets you build a website or make changes to it using text prompts.

faqs.question: Can I remove Unicorn Platform branding?
faqs.answer: Yes, branding removal is available starting on the Startup plan.

faqs.question: Is there a refund policy?
faqs.answer: Yes, Unicorn Platform offers a 30-day money-back guarantee.

faqs.question: Does it support custom code?
faqs.answer: Yes, all plans support inserting custom HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

use_cases.title: SaaS landing page
use_cases.description: Startups can launch a marketing site for a SaaS product using AI-assisted editing.

use_cases.title: Solo founder website
use_cases.description: Individual founders can build and publish a site without design help.

use_cases.title: Directory or blog site
use_cases.description: Publish a directory or blog-driven site with unlimited posts on higher tiers.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Unicorn Platform?
paragraphs: Unicorn Platform is a no-code website builder aimed at startups and solo founders, with an AI Co-Pilot that can build or edit pages from text prompts.
It offers a free-forever Lurker tier plus seven paid tiers that scale by number of published websites, from a single site on Maker up to 100 sites on the Major plan.

enrichment.short_description: Siter.io is a no-code website builder with a freehand visual editor and real-time team collaboration, made by Designmodo.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Siter.io is a no-code, freehand website builder with real-time collaboration and Figma import, free plan plus paid tiers starting at $7/month.

features.title: Freehand editor
features.description: Design freely with intuitive tools rather than a rigid grid system.

features.title: Figma import plugin
features.description: Import Figma designs directly into Siter.io to convert them into a live website.

features.title: Real-time collaboration
features.description: Multiple team members can edit a site together in real time.

features.title: Animation presets
features.description: Add customizable animation triggers and presets to page elements.

features.title: Custom code embeds
features.description: Insert custom code to embed tweets, maps, comments, and other content.

features.title: Forms
features.description: Collect visitor data directly through built-in forms.

pros: Free Start plan supports unlimited websites and teammates with generous page/form limits
Figma import plugin speeds up converting existing designs into live sites
Real-time collaboration is available even on lower-tier paid plans
Built-in Unsplash integration for royalty-free images
cons: Free plan has no custom domain or live publishing
HTML export is only available on the top Pro plan
Additional websites and editors beyond a plan's included seats cost extra per month

faqs.question: Is Siter.io free to use?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Start plan is free with unlimited websites and teammates, though it lacks custom domains and live publishing.

faqs.question: Can I import a Figma design?
faqs.answer: Yes, Siter.io has a Figma import plugin to convert designs into a live website.

faqs.question: Does it support real-time collaboration?
faqs.answer: Yes, team members can edit a site together in real time.

faqs.question: Can I download the HTML?
faqs.answer: Yes, but only on the Pro plan ($24/month).

faqs.question: Who makes Siter.io?
faqs.answer: Siter.io is made by Designmodo.

use_cases.title: Portfolio site
use_cases.description: Designers can build a portfolio using the freehand editor without a developer.

use_cases.title: Team-built landing page
use_cases.description: Marketing and creative teams can collaborate on a page in real time.

use_cases.title: Figma-to-website handoff
use_cases.description: Teams can import an existing Figma design and publish it as a live site.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Siter.io?
paragraphs: Siter.io is a no-code website builder built around a freehand visual editor, real-time team collaboration, and a plugin that imports Figma designs directly into the tool.
It's made by Designmodo and offers a free Start tier plus three paid tiers that scale by number of websites, pages, and editor seats.

enrichment.short_description: Readymag is a browser-based, no-code design tool for building animated websites, portfolios, presentations, and publications.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Readymag is a no-code, browser-based design tool for creating animated websites, portfolios, and presentations with a freeform canvas.

features.title: Freeform canvas
features.description: Positions elements anywhere on the page, allowing overlap and rotation similar to a print layout tool.

features.title: Animation and interactions
features.description: Create scroll effects, transitions, overlays, and multi-step interactions without code.

features.title: Typographic controls
features.description: Variable font support, precise letter-spacing and tracking, custom font upload, and baseline grids.

features.title: Multiple project types
features.description: Build websites, portfolios, presentations, editorials, and landing pages from one tool.

pros: Freeform canvas gives more creative layout control than grid-based site builders
Strong typography tools aimed at designers with a print background
Supports several distinct project types (portfolio, presentation, publication) in one tool
Browser-based, so no software installation is required
cons: No AI features are documented for the product
The freeform, code-free approach has a steeper learning curve than template-driven builders
Official pricing details were not accessible for direct verification at the time of writing

faqs.question: What is Readymag used for?
faqs.answer: It's used to design websites, portfolios, presentations, editorials, and other publications without writing code.

faqs.question: When was Readymag founded?
faqs.answer: Readymag was founded in 2012 and publicly launched in 2013.

faqs.question: Where is Readymag based?
faqs.answer: Its headquarters is in New York City, USA.

faqs.question: Does Readymag use a grid-based editor?
faqs.answer: No, it uses a freeform canvas that lets elements overlap and rotate freely, rather than a rigid grid.

use_cases.title: Design portfolio
use_cases.description: Designers can showcase work using precise typography and freeform layouts.

use_cases.title: Interactive presentation
use_cases.description: Teams can build animated, scroll-based presentations instead of static slide decks.

use_cases.title: Digital publication
use_cases.description: Publishers can create editorial-style online magazines and publications.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Readymag?
paragraphs: Readymag is a browser-based, no-code design tool, founded in 2012 and headquartered in New York City, that lets designers build websites, portfolios, presentations, and online publications.
It's built around a freeform canvas rather than a template grid, with strong typography controls and built-in support for scroll animations and multi-step interactions.

enrichment.short_description: Tilda is a no-code website builder with 550+ design blocks, an AI assistant for page creation, built-in CRM, and online stores.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Tilda is a no-code website builder with 550+ blocks, an AI page assistant, built-in CRM, and e-commerce, free plan plus paid tiers from $10/month.

features.title: Block library
features.description: Over 550 pre-designed, customizable content blocks.

features.title: AI on Tilda
features.description: Generates page copy, imagery, and interactive blocks from text prompts.

features.title: Zero Block
features.description: A more granular web design editor for advanced custom layouts.

features.title: Built-in CRM
features.description: Manage leads and customers without a separate CRM tool.

features.title: E-commerce
features.description: Sell products online with card, PayPal, and Stripe payment support.

features.title: SEO tools
features.description: Control H1 tags, alt text, meta descriptions, XML sitemaps, and robots.txt.

features.title: Source code export
features.description: Business plan subscribers can export a site's source code.

pros: Free plan lets you build and publish one website at no cost
AI on Tilda can generate full pages, copy, and imagery from prompts
Built-in CRM and email campaign tools reduce the need for separate software
Supports 10 interface languages beyond English
cons: Free plan is limited to a single website
Removing the "Made on Tilda" label requires an annual Personal or Business subscription
Only bank card payment is accepted for subscriptions

faqs.question: Is Tilda free?
faqs.answer: Yes, there's a free plan for one website; paid Personal and Business plans add more sites and features.

faqs.question: What does AI on Tilda do?
faqs.answer: It generates page copy, matching imagery, and custom interactive blocks from prompts.

faqs.question: Does Tilda include a CRM?
faqs.answer: Yes, it has a built-in CRM system.

faqs.question: Can I export my site's source code?
faqs.answer: Yes, on the Business plan you can export the source code.

faqs.question: What languages does Tilda support?
faqs.answer: English plus Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Russian, Ukrainian, Japanese, Chinese, and Kazakh.

use_cases.title: Landing page for a small business
use_cases.description: Business owners can launch a page with built-in CRM and payments.

use_cases.title: Online store
use_cases.description: Sell products with integrated card, PayPal, and Stripe payments.

use_cases.title: Multi-site agency work
use_cases.description: Agencies can manage up to 5 websites and export source code on the Business plan.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Tilda?
paragraphs: Tilda is a no-code website builder built around a library of 550+ design blocks, with an AI assistant ("AI on Tilda") that can generate full pages, copy, and imagery from a text prompt.
It also includes a built-in CRM, e-commerce and payment support, SEO controls, and interface support in ten languages besides English.

enrichment.short_description: Ucraft is a drag-and-drop website and online store builder with 120+ templates and a built-in AI support assistant.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Ucraft is a no-code drag-and-drop website builder with 120+ templates, e-commerce tools, and a free plan, paid plans starting at $6/month.

features.title: Drag-and-drop builder
features.description: Build websites and online stores visually without code.

features.title: 120+ templates
features.description: Designer-made templates spanning fashion, restaurants, photography, education, and more.

features.title: Logo Maker
features.description: A built-in tool for designing a logo alongside the website.

features.title: Hoory AI Assistant
features.description: An AI assistant for evaluating customer experience and setting up automated support.

features.title: E-commerce
features.description: Sell products with support for 50+ payment methods and 20+ shipping methods on higher plans.

features.title: Abandoned cart recovery
features.description: Recover lost sales on Pro Shop plans and above.

14-day free trial on paid plans with no credit card required
Includes a built-in AI support assistant (Hoory)

cons: Free plan carries Ucraft branding
0% transaction fees only start on the $13/month Basic Shop plan and above

faqs.question: Is Ucraft free?

faqs.question: Does Ucraft offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available on paid plans with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What is Hoory?
faqs.answer: Hoory is Ucraft's built-in AI assistant for customer support and evaluating customer experience.

faqs.question: Can I sell products with Ucraft?
faqs.answer: Yes, Basic Shop and above support online selling with 0% transaction fees on card payments.

faqs.question: How many templates does Ucraft offer?
faqs.answer: Over 120 designer-made templates across categories like fashion, restaurants, and photography.

use_cases.title: Small business website
use_cases.description: Business owners can launch a branded site from a template library.

use_cases.title: Online store
use_cases.description: Sellers can run a store with multiple payment and shipping options on Shop plans.

use_cases.title: Automated customer support
use_cases.description: Site owners can use the Hoory AI assistant to handle support inquiries.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Ucraft?
paragraphs: Ucraft is a drag-and-drop website and online store builder with over 120 designer-made templates, free hosting on Google Cloud, and a built-in Logo Maker.
Its Shop plans add e-commerce features like multiple payment and shipping methods and abandoned cart recovery, and the platform includes Hoory, a built-in AI assistant for customer support.

enrichment.short_description: Pixpa is a portfolio website builder for photographers and creatives with client galleries, proofing, and a zero-commission store.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Pixpa is a portfolio website builder for photographers and creatives with client galleries, proofing, and a zero-commission store, plans from $5.40/mo.

features.title: Visual editor
features.description: Drag-and-drop builder with full design control and no coding required.

features.title: 200+ templates
features.description: Designer-made, responsive templates customizable with layout, style, and custom CSS.

features.title: Client galleries
features.description: Private galleries with proofing, comments, multi-user favoriting, and image delivery.

features.title: Zero-commission store
features.description: Sell prints, products, services, and digital files without commission fees.

features.title: Built-in blog

features.title: Print fulfillment
